reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when the checked-in CLI smoke test directly exercises doctor output and the evidence boundary avoids claiming a live runner was executed.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic doctor packet behavior: the CLI either emits the runner-readiness next action or it does not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in doctor CLI smoke test, which asserts the ready payload can include a runner_readiness next action pointing at create_runner_assessment before first_bounded_run guidance.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing doctor guidance, runner-readiness next actions, or first_bounded_run payload shape.
